title: BuyerIntelPackage
description: Wraps the full buying-committee enrichment for all accounts in a client run. Produced by the Persona Builder agent in Phase 2.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this package was generated

accounts.description: Map of apex domain → array of BuyerProfile. Max 5 contacts per account.

total_accounts_processed.description: Number of ICP accounts for which contact enrichment was attempted

total_contacts_found.description: Total BuyerProfile records returned across all accounts

contacts_per_account_avg.description: Mean number of contacts per processed account

hunter_quota_used.description: Number of Hunter.io API credits consumed in this run

apollo_quota_used.description: Number of Apollo.io export credits consumed in this run

mismatches_flagged.description: Count of contacts where title_mismatch_flag=true, requiring Phase 3 reconciliation
